question: State of the phage-therapy literature for Pseudomonas aeruginosa
provenance: ALL 12 records are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic records (doi prefix 10.9999/*, marked illustrative:true) that demonstrate the evidence-scan detectors on realistic phage-therapy themes. None is a real publication; Keystone badges every one as illustrative and never presents it as a real DOI. The frontier vet screens real user-provided gene annotations, not these DOIs.
